notes: Game after last patches running horrible, performance is bad overall. Unplayable at the moment

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 9070 (radeonsi, gfx1201, LLVM 21.1.5, DRM 3.64, 6.18.0-2-cachyos)
notes: Switching to Proton Experimental made it work for my setup.

With "Experimental" I was able to enter the main menu. With Proton default and Proton-GE this was not possible. On default I had a black screen. On GE the game freezes after pressing "accept" on the game setting which popup automatically when you start the game the first time.

With experimental, I was able to update the settings, create a character and choose "new game" from the main menu. When the intro-video plays, the game freezes and must be killed via task-manager. Even trying to skip the video leads to a freeze. I can't play the game. I've tried different graphics settings like "very low" and deactivating graphics settings like reflections.
